pr.title: Record: EngramLite + Gated Skips + Full GPTQ + FA3 — val_bpb 1.1146 (1-seed, 2 pending)

output.summary: Combines EngramLite gated hash embeddings, Turbo-Muon optimizer tweaks, and Full Hessian GPTQ with FlashAttention3 on an 11-layer SWA model.
techniques: EngramLite multi-head bigram+trigram hash with sigmoid-gated U-Net skips
Turbo-Muon with LeakyReLU(0.3)² and LR floor for optimizer stability
Full Hessian GPTQ calibration alongside XSA and FlashAttention3 for quantized eval
